/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libtermin_scene.so -o bin/libtermin_scene.so CMakeFiles/termin_scene.dir/src/termin_scene_version.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_scene.dir/src/tc_archetype.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_scene.dir/src/tc_component.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_scene.dir/src/tc_entity_pool.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_scene.dir/src/tc_entity_pool_registry.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_scene.dir/src/tc_hash_map.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_scene.dir/src/tc_scene.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_scene.dir/src/tc_scene_extension.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_scene.dir/src/tc_type_registry.c.o CMakeFiles/termin_scene.dir/src/tc_value.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: /usr/local/lib/libtermin_graphics.so.0.1.0 /usr/local/lib/libtermin_base.so -lm /usr/local/lib/libglad.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
